content:
# Final Review Planner Positions
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Amendment fr-1-c26197c2 incorrectly claims the flake.nix fix is missing. The flake.nix changes (adding pkgs.procps and pkgs.util-linux to nativeCheckInputs and devShell packages) were committed in the checkpoint commit ce04dcc7. The uncommitted diff only shows orchestration metadata because that is the only thing that changed AFTER the checkpoint — the substantive fix is already in the repo. The amendment's analysis is based on looking at the wrong diff (uncommitted changes vs. the full change set from the implementation stage).

## Votes

- `fr-1-c26197c2`: Reject
  The amendment's claim is factually incorrect. The flake.nix fix IS present in the change set — it was committed in checkpoint ce04dcc7 which added pkgs.procps and pkgs.util-linux to both nativeCheckInputs and devShells.default.packages. The uncommitted diff only shows orchestration metadata (.ralph-burning/ files) because those are the only files modified after the checkpoint commit. The implementation artifact confirms the fix was validated with successful nix build and cargo test runs. The reviewer appears to have only examined the uncommitted working tree diff rather than the full committed change set.
